header.headline: RDMA Observer Architecture
header.subtitle: Observer systems need a clear map from transport events to collected metrics and control decisions.

transport.title: Transport Layer
transport.body: RDMA traffic and completions form the raw event stream.

observer.title: Observer Core
observer.body: The observer aggregates and classifies transport behavior into usable signals.

metrics.title: Metrics Surface
metrics.body: Collected signals become dashboards, alerts, and replayable traces.

control.title: Control Plane
control.body: Operators and automation act on the observed state with explicit policies.

outcome.title: Closed Loop
outcome.body: The system stays legible when observations and control actions stay connected.

footer.note: Observer architectures are good training seeds because they join measurement, artifacts, and action.
